articles.title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation: Queen's Blood Returns
articles.description: Final Fantasy VII Remake Trilogy director reveals changes to the beloved card game in the trilogy's final entry. Exciting updates await fans of Queen's Blood.
articles.impact: Fans can expect significant gameplay changes.

articles.title: Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse Delayed on Switch
articles.description: Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse will launch on October 15, 2026, but the Nintendo Switch version will be delayed. Players on other platforms will get it on time.
articles.impact: Switch players must wait longer for release.

articles.title: Xbox's Exclusive Strategy Confusion Continues
articles.description: Microsoft's approach to Xbox console exclusives remains unclear, with some first-party games exclusive to Xbox while others may come to PlayStation 5.
articles.impact: Gamers are left uncertain about future titles.

articles.title: Crazy Taxi World Tour: AI Controversy Unveiled
articles.description: Sega announces Crazy Taxi World Tour, but faces backlash for using generative AI in development. Fans react to the controversial decision.
articles.impact: Sega's AI use sparks heated discussions.

articles.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Launches July 28
articles.description: Halo: Campaign Evolved is set to launch on July 28, 2026, with pre-orders now available. Early access begins on July 23.
articles.impact: Fans eagerly await the new Halo experience.

articles.title: XBOX Games Showcase 2026 Highlights
articles.description: The XBOX Games Showcase 2026 featured new exclusives, anniversary hardware, and exciting game announcements. A recap of the event is now available.
articles.impact: XBOX showcases its commitment to gaming innovation.

articles.title: Clockwork Revolution Set for 2027 Launch
articles.description: First-person RPG Clockwork Revolution will launch in 2027 for Xbox Series and PC. Players will manipulate time in a steampunk setting.
articles.impact: Gamers anticipate a unique RPG experience.

articles.title: Persona 6 Announced for Multiple Platforms
articles.description: ATLUS has officially announced Persona 6 for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC. No release date has been provided yet.
articles.impact: Fans eagerly await more details on Persona 6.

articles.title: Microsoft Unveils 25th Anniversary Xbox Console
articles.description: Microsoft reveals a translucent green anniversary console featuring a glowing Xbox button and matching controller. A nostalgic tribute to Xbox's legacy.
articles.impact: A nostalgic celebration of Xbox's history.

articles.title: Senua: New Action-Adventure Game Revealed
articles.description: Ninja Theory introduces Senua, a new action-adventure game set in the Hellblade universe. Details revealed during the XBOX Games Showcase.
articles.impact: Fans are excited for Senua's new adventure.

articles.title: Fallout 76 Launches P.R.O.T.E.C.T. Protocol
articles.description: Fallout 76 players can log in daily for rewards from June 7 to June 15. Participate in the Community Challenge to unlock exclusive items.
articles.impact: Players are incentivized to engage daily.

articles.title: State of Decay 3 Gameplay Revealed
articles.description: The first gameplay reveal for State of Decay 3 showcases open-world exploration, multiplayer, and crafting elements. Fans are excited for the new features.
articles.impact: Fans are eager for State of Decay 3.

articles.title: Persona 4 Revival Launches February 2027
articles.description: Persona 4 Revival will be available on February 18, 2027, for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC. Pre-orders are now open.
articles.impact: Fans can secure their copies early.

articles.title: Nintendo Switch Now Supports Classic Wii Games
articles.description: Nintendo Switch owners can now access classic Wii and GameCube games. Instructions for playing these titles are available online.
articles.impact: Nintendo Switch expands its game library.

articles.title: Fable Reveals Cast Including Hayley Atwell
articles.description: Fable's new trailer showcases its cast, including Hayley Atwell as the villain. Exciting gameplay and story elements were also revealed.
articles.impact: Fable's cast adds excitement to the game.
